data.title: Trump urges Powell for interest rate cuts during visit to newly-renovated Federal Reserve, valued at $2.5 billion; Fed expected to maintain rates at 4.25% to 4.50%.
data.description: President Donald Trump made a rare visit to the Federal Reserve headquarters where he publicly urged Fed Chair Jerome Powell to implement significant interest rate cuts and criticized the central bank's $2.5 billion renovation project. Trump reiterated his desire for lower rates during the visit, stating, "I'd love him to lower interest rates," while touring the Fed's headquarters with Powell. The visit occurred shortly before the upcoming meeting of the Fed's rate-setting committee, where the 19 policy-makers are expected to maintain benchmark interest rates within the 4.25% to 4.50% range. The tensions escalated during the visit. This story includes additional details which can be found on Benzinga.com.

Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has stressed that every possible effort must be made immediately to protect innocent lives and alleviate the suffering and starvation of the people of Gaza, calling on the international community to act without delay.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash price surpasses $526 resistance, aiming for $612 target level with institutional interest fueling growth.
data.description: The price of BCH has increased to $526.40, marking a 1% rise following a breakthrough of a significant resistance level. Institutional interest is fueling a bullish trend, pushing towards a target level of $612.

data.title: NETSTREIT Corp. prices upsized offering of 10.8M common shares at $17.70 each, totaling $191.16M, with option for 1.62M more.
data.description: In Dallas, NETSTREIT Corp. revealed it has priced a public offering of 10.8 million shares of its common stock at $17.70 per share, with the underwriters also having the option to acquire up to 1.62 million additional shares. The closing of the offering is anticipated on July 28, 2025, subject to standard closing conditions. BofA Securities is one of the firms involved in the transaction.

data.title: In remote villages of East China, solutions for caring for seniors entail light housework and walks, like Xu Furong's daily 10-minute stroll with her 90-year-old husband.
data.description: In Beijing on July 24, 2025, Xu Furong, an 86-year-old resident of Nanliuzhuang village, is living a life filled with happiness. Her day begins with light housework before taking a 10-minute walk hand in hand with her 90-year-old husband, traversing two streets.

data.title: Torch-TensorRT boosts PyTorch model efficiency for NVIDIA GPUs, doubling inference speed for diffusion models with minor tweaks.
data.description: Learn about the benefits of using Torch-TensorRT, a tool that enhances PyTorch models for NVIDIA GPUs. Through this optimization, inference speed for diffusion models is doubled with just a few code adjustments. Explore further to understand how this tool can significantly improve performance on NVIDIA GPUs.

data.title: UNI surpasses $10 with whales driving rally to multi-month high of $10.34; targets $13.00. Now trading at $10.03.
data.description: The price of UNI has surged to $10.03 from its recent high above $10.34, thanks to significant accumulation by large investors (whales) and bullish technical indicators. Analysts are eyeing a potential target of $13.00 as the cryptocurrency continues its upward momentum.

data.title: XRP falls 2.5% as Ripple co-founder transfers $150M worth of coins, with 50M XRP tokens moved from wallet since July 17, totaling $155M currently. Larsen's wallet still holds 2.28B XRP worth over $7B, accounting for 3.80% of XRP's market cap. 40M XRP moved to exchanges, 10M to new wallets.
data.description: Chris Larsen, co-founder and executive chairman of Ripple, saw a significant movement in his wallet recently. Over the past week, approximately 50 million XRP tokens valued at $155 million were transferred from his wallet. Despite this transfer, Larsen still holds 2.28 billion XRP worth over $7 billion, which constitutes around 3.80% of XRP's total market capitalization. The on-chain analytics firm CryptoQuant reported that 40 million XRP were sent to exchanges and services, while another 10 million XRP were moved to two new wallets. This transaction took place between July 17 and 2025.
Singapore’s home prices have risen more than anticipated, with the surge occurring just before the implementation of new curbs aimed at cooling the housing market.

data.title: LG Energy Solution reports KRW 5.6 trillion revenue and KRW 492.2 billion operating profit in Q2 2025 without NA production incentive, citing product mix enhancements and cost efficiency.
data.description: In the second quarter of 2025, LG Energy Solution reported consolidated revenue of KRW 5.6 trillion and operating profit of KRW 492.2 billion. Despite not receiving North American production incentives, the company achieved quarterly operating profit through improvements in product mix and cost efficiency.
